EventLog.message: 💪 Brosville Dudes vs 🌈 Nowhere Else Like Yonder @ Field
💪 Brosville Dudes Jackson Koval vs. 🌈 Nowhere Else Like Yonder Kate Triples

1. LF Nice Tanner
2. 1B Cecilia Ogden
3. 3B Fizz Cartwright
4. RF Rodney Kumar
5. CF Luke Petrosyan
6. SS Voicemail Skov
7. DH Dora Castaneda
8. C Gladys Ivanov
9. 2B Casey McNally

1. 2B McBaseball Hubbard
2. CF Vernon Marshfield
3. SS Jessica Lincolnshire
4. LF Samuel Hunt
5. 3B Roberto Marks
6. RF Violet Castle
7. DH Lifen Ally
8. 1B Odysseus Chen
9. C Elena Magras
Start of the top of the 1st. 💪 Brosville Dudes batting. 🌈 Kate Triples pitching.
Now batting: Nice Tanner (1st PA of game)
Now batting: Cecilia Ogden (1st PA of game)
Cecilia Ogden hits a line drive to the pitcher.
Cecilia Ogden singles on a line drive to P Kate Triples. Nice Tanner to third base.
Now batting: Fizz Cartwright (1st PA of game)
Fizz Cartwright hits a ground ball to the pitcher. 📣 Chants thunder around the stadium!
Fizz Cartwright reaches on a fielding error by SP1 Kate Triples. Nice Tanner scores! Cecilia Ogden to second base.
Now batting: Rodney Kumar (1st PA of game)
Rodney Kumar is hit by the pitch and advances to first base. Cecilia Ogden to third base. Fizz Cartwright to second base.
Now batting: Luke Petrosyan (1st PA of game)
Strike, looking. 0-1. 📣 The hometown faithful are loving this!
Luke Petrosyan hits a ground ball to second base.

Luke Petrosyan grounds into a double play, 2B McBaseball Hubbard to C Elena Magras to 1B Odysseus Chen. Cecilia Ogden out at home. Luke Petrosyan out at first base. Fizz Cartwright to third base. Rodney Kumar to second base.
Now batting: Voicemail Skov (1st PA of game)
End of the top of the 1st.
Start of the bottom of the 1st. 🌈 Nowhere Else Like Yonder batting. 💪 Jackson Koval pitching.
Now batting: McBaseball Hubbard (1st PA of game)
Now batting: Vernon Marshfield (1st PA of game)
Vernon Marshfield hits a ground ball to the pitcher.
Vernon Marshfield grounds out, P Jackson Koval to 1B Cecilia Ogden.
Now batting: Jessica Lincolnshire (1st PA of game)
Jessica Lincolnshire hits a line drive to center field.
Jessica Lincolnshire lines out to CF Luke Petrosyan.
End of the bottom of the 1st.
Start of the top of the 2nd. 💪 Brosville Dudes batting. 🌈 Kate Triples pitching.

Ball. 2-1. Dora Castaneda steals second base! 📣 The crowd is pumped up!
Now batting: Casey McNally (1st PA of game)
Ball. 2-0. 📣 Home supporters whistle and cheer!
Casey McNally hits a fly ball to right field.
Casey McNally doubles on a fly ball to RF Violet Castle. Dora Castaneda scores!
Cecilia Ogden hits a ground ball to second base.
Cecilia Ogden grounds out, 2B McBaseball Hubbard to 1B Odysseus Chen.
End of the top of the 2nd.
Start of the bottom of the 2nd. 🌈 Nowhere Else Like Yonder batting. 💪 Jackson Koval pitching.

Ball 4. Violet Castle walks. Roberto Marks to second base.

Ball. 1-1. Roberto Marks is caught stealing third base.

Vernon Marshfield doubles on a line drive to LF Nice Tanner. Elena Magras scores!

Vernon Marshfield grounds into a force out, SS Voicemail Skov to 2B Casey McNally. McBaseball Hubbard out at second.
Now batting: Jessica Lincolnshire (0 for 3, 1 LO, 1 FO, 1 PO)
Strike, looking. 0-2. Vernon Marshfield steals second base!
Foul ball. 0-2. 📣 The place is rocking!
Jessica Lincolnshire is hit by the pitch and advances to first base.
Now batting: Samuel Hunt (0 for 3, 1 GO, 2 SO)

Samuel Hunt homers on a fly ball to left field! Vernon Marshfield scores! Jessica Lincolnshire scores!

End of the bottom of the 8th.
Start of the top of the 9th. 💪 Brosville Dudes batting. SP1 Kate Triples is leaving the game. 🌈 CL Uncle Marichal takes the mound.
Now batting: Nice Tanner (0 for 3, 1 BB, 2 SO, 1 FO)
Strike, swinging. 0-1. 📣 The decibels rise to a frenzy!
Now batting: Cecilia Ogden (1 for 4, 1 1B, 2 GO, 1 SO)
Cecilia Ogden hits a line drive to left field. 📣 The cheers echo off the walls!
Cecilia Ogden singles on a line drive to LF Samuel Hunt.
Now batting: Fizz Cartwright (0 for 3, 1 FO, 1 GO, 1 BB)
Fizz Cartwright hits a fly ball to center field. 📣 The fans are fired up!
Fizz Cartwright singles on a fly ball to CF Vernon Marshfield. Cecilia Ogden to third base.
Now batting: Rodney Kumar (1 for 2, 1 HBP, 1 SO, 1 BB, 1 2B)
Strike, looking. 1-2. Fizz Cartwright steals second base!
Foul ball. 2-2. 📣 Fans are losing their minds!
Now batting: Luke Petrosyan (0 for 4, 1 GIDP, 3 GO, 1 FO)
Luke Petrosyan hits a fly ball to left field.
Luke Petrosyan flies out to LF Samuel Hunt.
End of the top of the 9th.

🌈 Nowhere Else Like Yonder receives a 🥊 Scheming Slugger's Mitts of the Cat Shipment. 💪 Brosville Dudes receives a 💍 Lightning Ring of the Gale Shipment. 💪 Brosville Dudes receives a 🦾 Whirling Pitcher's Sleeve of the Cannon Shipment.
🌈 Nowhere Else Like Yonder defeated 💪 Brosville Dudes. Final score: 5-4
